## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / content
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Study notes / MCQ update
- [ ] Blog post
- [ ] CI/CD / tooling / dependency update
- [ ] Docs update

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (no errors)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Tested in browser at `localhost:5173`
- [ ] Content follows the schema in `src/types/content.ts`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, tokens, or credentials
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for features and fixes
- [ ] If adding a question — exactly one correct answer, explanation cites a source

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number — required for feature/content PRs -->
